expectations.text: Avoids CRM-transactional language (touch base, circle back, ping, nurture)
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Does not frame relationships as metrics (engagement, conversion, ROI)
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Response references specific people with specific context, not generic advice
expectations.evidence: References February spiral, Rachel picking up phone, January pricing call with Rob, two referrals from Jennifer

expectations.text: Frames the task relationally (care, curiosity, gratitude) not transactionally (opportunity, leverage)
expectations.evidence: Messages center on appreciation without hidden agenda; 'isn't a project update — just a thank-you'

expectations.text: Produces 3 distinct messages (different voices/angles for each person)
expectations.evidence: Three distinct registers: sibling intimacy, mentor-student peer, client professional warmth

expectations.text: Each message references the specific contribution (Q1 panic, raising prices, 2 referrals)
expectations.evidence: All three specifically named: Q1 mess in head, January pricing advice, two referrals unprompted
